generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance MotorCurrentActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller providing input current (I_M) to the permanent magnet synchronous motor for torque generation. Supports position, speed, or acceleration control modes."
]

instance GearTransmissionActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Mechanical gear transmission system converting motor torque (τ_M) to intermediate gearwheel torque (τ_G) with specified gear ratios."
]

instance CycloidalGearboxActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox transmitting final output torque (τ_out) to the robot's first vertical axis with high precision and backlash compensation."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Primary position encoder directly mounted on the permanent magnet synchronous motor measuring angular position (r_M) with high resolution."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderDataStream
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder located behind the gearbox measuring system output angle (r_out) for backlash and elasticity compensation."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderDataStream
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring input current (I_M) to the motor for torque calculation and control feedback."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataStream
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance MotorEncoderDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
    base:desc "Real-time MQTT-streamed time-series data of motor angular position (r_M) with 1ms resolution."
]

instance SecondaryEncoderDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
    base:desc "Real-time MQTT-streamed time-series data of system output angle (r_out) with 1ms resolution."
]

instance MotorCurrentDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
    base:desc "Real-time MQTT-streamed time-series data of motor input current (I_M) with 1ms resolution."
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance ManufacturerDynamicsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Manufacturer-provided dynamics model for torque/velocity/acceleration calculations in the motor and gear transmission system."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkExecutionEnvironment
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model implemented in Simulink for static and viscous friction characterization in the gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkExecutionEnvironment
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model implemented in Simulink capturing velocity-dependent friction effects in the gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkExecutionEnvironment
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model implemented in Simulink for dynamic friction behavior analysis in the gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkExecutionEnvironment
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model implemented in Simulink for comprehensive friction characterization including pre-sliding displacement."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkExecutionEnvironment
]

instance FrictionlessGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Idealized frictionless gearbox model for baseline torque/velocity/acceleration simulations."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkExecutionEnvironment
]

instance FrictionAwareGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Friction-aware gearbox model integrating all friction models for comprehensive simulation of motor (Simulation_M), gearwheel (Simulation_GW), and gearbox (Simulation_GB)."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkExecutionEnvironment
]

instance MotorTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived motor torque (τ_M) calculated from input current (I_M) using manufacturer dynamics model."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkExecutionEnvironment
]

instance GearwheelTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived gearwheel torque (τ_G) calculated from motor torque (τ_M) considering gear ratios and transmission losses."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorTorqueData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkExecutionEnvironment
]

instance SystemOutputTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived system output torque (τ_out) after cycloidal gearbox considering all friction effects."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearwheelTorqueData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkExecutionEnvironment
]

instance MotorAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived motor angular velocity (ω) from differential analysis of motor encoder data (r_M)."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkExecutionEnvironment
]

instance SystemAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived system output angular velocity from differential analysis of secondary encoder data (r_out)."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkExecutionEnvironment
]

instance FrictionParametersData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Extracted friction parameters (static, kinetic, viscous) from real-time comparison between measured and simulated data."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorTorqueData, GearwheelTorqueData, SystemOutputTorqueData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelRefinementService
]

instance SystemMetadata : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Metadata containing source information (sensor/channel), computation method, and time intervals for all data traces."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TraceabilityService
]

// C11: Enablers
instance SimulinkExecutionEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink environment executing all friction and dynamics models with real-time data integration."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelSimulationService, DataComparisonService
]

instance MQTTStreamingProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for unidirectional streaming of time-series sensor data from physical system to digital shadow."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataIngestionService
]

instance SysMLModelingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML environment for structural modeling (Block Definition Diagrams) and behavioral modeling (Internal Block Diagrams)."
]

instance ModelBasedSystemsEngineering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE) methodologies (RFLP, OOSEM) for system decomposition and integration."
]

instance UnifiedDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization dashboard displaying measured vs. simulated data traces for torque, angular velocity, and acceleration."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

// C6: Services
instance DataIngestionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service handling real-time ingestion of MQTT-streamed sensor data (I_M, r_M, r_out) into the digital shadow."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataIngestionInsight
]

instance FrictionModelSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service executing all friction models (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre) in Simulink for real-time friction analysis."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionCharacterizationInsight, ModelRefinementAction
]

instance DataComparisonService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service comparing measured data traces with simulated outputs to identify deviations and friction effects."
    DTDFVocab:provides DeviationAnalysisInsight
]

instance TraceabilityService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service maintaining semantic links between data points and their sources/computation methods via metadata."
    DTDFVocab:provides TraceabilityInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing unified visualization of measured vs. simulated data traces for operational monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance ModelRefinementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service continuously improving friction models through live data comparison and parameter adjustment."
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelImprovementInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance DataIngestionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Confirmation of successful real-time data ingestion from all physical sensors via MQTT streaming."
]

instance FrictionCharacterizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identified friction parameters (static, kinetic, viscous) in the gearbox with 95% confidence interval."
]

instance DeviationAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected deviations between measured and simulated data indicating potential friction anomalies or wear."
]

instance TraceabilityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Complete traceability of all data points to their sources (sensors/models) and computation methods with time intervals."
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of torque, angular velocity, and acceleration discrepancies between physical and virtual systems."
]

instance ModelRefinementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of friction model parameters based on deviation analysis."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ControlParameterUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Recommendation for CNC controller (SINUMERIK 840D sl) parameter updates to compensate for identified friction effects."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ModelImprovementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous improvement of friction models through iterative comparison with live operational data."
]

// C1: System Under Study
instance FirstVerticalAxis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "First vertical axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot (6-axis serial robot) with working range [-90°, 90°] and max angular speed 75°/s."
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor providing torque (τ_M) to the gear transmission system."
]

instance GearTransmissionSystem : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Mechanical gear transmission system converting motor torque to intermediate gearwheel torque with specified ratios."
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "High-precision cycloidal gearbox transmitting final output torque (τ_out) with backlash compensation."
]

instance DigitalShadowEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Centralized digital shadow environment for the first vertical axis implementing all friction modeling capabilities."
    base:contains FirstVerticalAxisDigitalShadow, FrictionModelLibrary, SimulationModels
]

instance FirstVerticalAxisDigitalShadow : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital shadow instance for the first vertical axis integrating all physical data and virtual models."
]

instance FrictionModelLibrary : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Library containing all friction models (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre) for dynamic exchange."
]

instance SimulationModels : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Collection of simulation models (frictionless and friction-aware) for motor, gearwheel, and gearbox."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DS operates in **real-time** with **dynamic data exchange** during robot operation. Data traces (e.g., torque, angular velocity) are updated at the **sensor sampling rate** (not explicitly specified but implied to be high-frequency for control purposes). The DS supports **continuous, online identification** of friction models, adapting to changes like **wear, tool variations, or operational conditions**. No batch processing or offline updates are described."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DS is orchestrated as a **purpose-driven, asset-specific constellation** with the following components:
  1. **Physical Asset**: MABI MAX 100 robot (first axis).
  2. **Data Sources**: Sensors (encoders, current sensors) streaming via MQTT.
  3. **Processing Pipeline**:
     - **Data Acquisition**: Raw sensor data (`I_M`, angle).
     - **Data Calculation**: Derived torque/velocity/acceleration (using manufacturer models).
     - **Simulation**: Friction-aware Simulink models (`Simulation_M`, `Simulation_GW`, `Simulation_GB`).
     - **Comparison**: Deviation analysis between measured (`r_M`, `r_G`, `r_out`) and simulated (`ˆr_M`, `ˆr_G`, `ˆr_out`) data.
  4. **Output**: Dashboard visualization and friction model updates.
  The constellation follows the **Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM)** (Fig. 1) with explicit **Processing**, **Model**, and **DataTrace** components, ensuring traceability."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DS covers the **operational phase** of the physical system, focusing on **real-time monitoring and friction analysis** during robot operation. It does not explicitly address:
  - **Design phase** (ideal/as-designed models).
  - **Manufacturing phase** (as-manufactured deviations).
  The DS is **purpose-driven** (friction modeling) and **asset-specific** (first axis), with no mention of lifecycle transitions (e.g., from shadow to twin). The **SysML models** (structural and behavioral) and **Simulink simulations** are used to represent the **as-operated** state."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Traceability**: Each data point is linked to its **source (sensor/processing component)** and **computation method** (e.g., Simulink model, manufacturer dynamics).
  - **Deviation Analysis**: Comparison of **measured vs. simulated data** (e.g., torque/velocity) to validate friction models.
  - **Uncertainty Handling**: The DS accounts for **wear, tool changes, and operational conditions** by continuously updating models.
  - **Verification**: No explicit validation protocols (e.g., statistical tests) are mentioned, but the **dashboard visualization** provides qualitative feedback on model accuracy.
  Errors are mitigated via **dual encoders** (reducing backlash/elasticity uncertainty) and **manufacturer-provided parameters** for dynamics models."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The **technical connection** between the PT and DS is established via:
  - **MQTT protocol** for **real-time, unidirectional data streaming** from sensors (encoders, current sensors) to the DS.
  - **No direct network architecture details** (e.g., latency, bandwidth) are provided, but the system implies **low-latency requirements** for control purposes.
  - **Data traceability** is maintained via **metadata** (source, computation method) and **UML associations** in the DSRM (Fig. 1)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DS is deployed as a **software system** with:
  - **Executable components**: Simulink models (`Simulation_M`, `Simulation_GW`, `Simulation_GB`) running on a **host system** (not specified, likely a PC or cloud server).
  - **Dashboard**: Visualization tool (technology unspecified) for displaying data traces and deviations.
  - **No details on deployment environment** (e.g., edge computing, cloud) or **scalability** for multiple axes/robots. The DS is **asset-specific** to the first axis."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DS adheres to:
  - **SysML** (for structural/behavioral modeling) and **UML** (for the Digital Shadow Reference Model).
  - **MathWorks Simulink** for executable simulations (no open standard).
  - **Asset Administration Shell (AAS)** is implied for semantic integration but not detailed.
  No explicit standards (e.g., ISO, IEC) are referenced for data exchange (MQTT) or modeling."
]
